description.p: Photo Viewer is a GTK and Libadwaita photo application for browsing large local photo collections, opening albums, managing trash, and applying basic edits such as rotation, crop, brightness, contrast, and saturation.

Prepares the application for a Flathub-oriented 0.9 release with a GitHub-derived application ID, updated metadata, video viewing, motion photo support, album management, theme preferences, and performance improvements for large local libraries.
Fixes virtual scrolling at the end of large photo libraries so the final page loads placeholders and thumbnails correctly.
Adds full browsing, thumbnails, viewer, albums, trash, editing, and Flatpak packaging support.
